title: WILLED RGB Puck Lights,Rechargeable Under Cabinet Kitchen Lights with Remote Control, Wireless Under Counter Light with Timer Function,Dimmable LED Touch Light for Kitchen,Cabinet,Closet,3 Pack
features: [Rechargeable & Energy-Saving]-These puck lights come with a built-in 1200mAh rechargeable battery, eliminating the need for disposable batteries—better for the environment and your wallet. Each rechargeable under cabinet kitchen lights lasts up to 10 hours at maximum brightness and 90 hours at minimum brightness. The 3-in-1 USB Type-C cable allows you to charge three lights at once, saving you time and up to 80 AA batteries per year, per light.

[Two Control Modes & Timer Function]-The puck lights offer two control options: touch control and remote control. A short tap lets you turn the lights on/off or switch between colors, while a long press adjusts the brightness. The remote also features a timer, allowing you to set the rechargeable under cupboard kitchen lights to automatically turn off after 15, 30, or 60 minutes. These wardrobe lights are an excellent choice for cabinet, countertop, closet, or shelf lighting.

[2 RGB Dynamic Modes & Dimmabl]-These under cabinet lights feature 9 colors and two RGB modes to set the perfect atmosphere. In Smooth Mode, 13 vibrant colors gracefully cycle in and out. Alternatively, you can select Fade Mode for a calming transition of single-color brightness, mimicking a gentle breathing light. Use the remote to adjust the brightness to three levels (30%, 50%, 100%). A quick touch of the on/off button changes the color, while a long press allows for seamless brightness adjustment.

[Wireless Portable & Easy Install]-Method 1: Each under counter lights features built-in strong magnets, allowing you to effortlessly attach it to any metal surface. Method 2: Use the included adhesive iron sheet for quick installation—just peel and stick in just 3 seconds! These magnetic rechargeable puck lights with remote are easy to remove, making them portable and perfect for use in closets, cabinets, bedrooms, kitchens, counters, wardrobes, shelves, and more.

[Free Replacement]-We offer a 12-month warranty on our battery powered stick on lights. If you encounter any issues after receiving or using our under cupboard lights rechargeable, please don’t hesitate to contact us.
